project_type: Python PySide6 desktop app with CLI (Typer)
test_framework: pytest with pytest-qt for GUI tests; conftest.py has shared fixtures (sample_doc, mock_translator, tmp_stf)
verification_instructions: Run QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest -q and confirm all tests pass including new ones
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' (already done - all deps installed)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Python 3.11 default. PySide6 6.10.3, pytest 8.4.2, pytest-qt 4.5.0 already installed. GUI tests need QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen.
contribution_requirements: Use ruff for linting (line-length=100, target py39). Tests in tests/ directory. GUI tests in tests/gui/. CLI tests use typer CliRunner.
key_patterns: Entry is a frozen dataclass (key, label, translation, approved). Document.entries is a mutable list of Entry instances. Phase4ReviewPage._EntriesModel wraps Document and emits edited(row) signal on setData. Pages extend PhasePage base class. CLI commands use Typer app. MainWindow has _build_menu() creating Edit menu with Settings action.
directory_structure: src/stx/ = main package; src/stx/gui/ = GUI layer; src/stx/gui/pages/ = pipeline phase pages; src/stx/translate/ = translation backends; src/stx/stf/ = STF parser/writer; src/stx/excel/ = Excel import/export; tests/ = pytest tests; tests/gui/ = GUI smoke tests
